![](files/full_block_header.png){width=100%}


| Phase              | Weekday  | Date           | Description                           | Deliverables               | Notes                     |
| :------------------: | :--------: | :--------------: | :-------------------------------------: | :--------------------------------------: | :-------------------------: |
| Dance Study Phase  |         | Aug – Dec 2025 | Preparation & Research      |                                       | Selecting dancers to learn the basic movements of the chosen style |
| Registration Open  | Tuesday   | 3/10/2026       | Registration Opens                    | Fill out the [form](registration.qmd) |                           |
| Registration Close | Friday   | 3/20/2026       | Registration Closes at 5pm                  | Last day to register                   |                           |
| [Kickoff Weekend](kickoff.qmd)    | Saturday | 3/21/2026      | Jam Kickoff                  |       | Intro & workshops         |
|                    | Sunday   | 3/22/2026      | Team Worktime   |   Draft Choreography Submission                                     |       Teams build out a draft choreography          |
| [Refinement](refinement.qmd) |  | 3/23 - 4/14     | Refinement and Fine Tuning      |   Final Choreography Submission  | Feedback sessions         |
| [Showcase Event](showcase.qmd)     | Friday   | 5/9/2026       | Showcase  |     | Celebration & networking  |
